variants: Ailani Kupono has made her home in Murkmire Hollow after being born in Sandbar Heights. She is employed at Xylo Core Analytics, where her innovative ideas shine through in her work, particularly her development of the Pineglade Index Module. Ailani's excellence in data analytics has earned her the prestigious Foxglove Merit Award, underscoring her significant contributions to the industry. Her journey reflects both her dedication and talent, making her a notable figure in her field.
